title: grammitis subevenosa
intro: Grammitis subevenosa, also known as the even-leaved grammitis, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Grammitis subevenosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a component in traditional remedies.
